summary: Currency selection fixes testing completed successfully. All 22 tests passed. The three fixes implemented are working correctly: 1) getConfiguredCurrenciesForCheckout filters by accepted_currencies, 2) getData returns available_currencies, 3) Currency validation at payment time rejects disallowed currencies.
critical_code_review_comments: Currency selection fixes are properly implemented and working
getData correctly returns available_currencies for restricted payment links
configured-currencies endpoint correctly filters to only accepted_currencies
Payment validation correctly rejects currencies not in accepted_currencies list
Unrestricted links (no accepted_currencies) correctly return all configured wallets
seed_data_creation: Test payment links created during testing were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Currency selection fixes verified working. Key endpoints tested: POST /api/pay/createPaymentLink (with/without accepted_currencies), POST /api/pay/getData (returns available_currencies), GET /api/pay/configured-currencies (filters by accepted_currencies), POST /api/pay/createCryptoPayment (validates currency against accepted_currencies). Company 38 has configured: BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE, TRX, USDT-TRC20, USDT-ERC20.

tests_executed.TestCreatePaymentLinkWithCurrencies::tes: PASSED - Creates link with BTC,ETH restriction, returns accepted_currencies array
PASSED - Creates link with null accepted_currencies (all configured)
tests_executed.TestGetDataAvailableCurrencies::test_get: PASSED - getData returns available_currencies=[BTC,ETH] for restricted link
PASSED - getData returns all 7 configured currencies for unrestricted link
tests_executed.TestConfiguredCurrenciesFiltering::test_: PASSED - configured-currencies returns only BTC,ETH for restricted link
PASSED - configured-currencies returns all 7 configured currencies for unrestricted link
tests_executed.TestCurrencyValidationAtPayment::test_pa: PASSED - Payment with LTC (not allowed) returns 400 with correct error message
tests_executed.TestExistingPaymentLink::test_existing_l: PASSED - Existing test link getData works
tests_executed.test_get_company_currencies_success: PASSED - Returns all 9 crypto types with configuration status
tests_executed.test_create_payment_link_with_accepted_c: PASSED - Creates link with specific currencies
tests_executed.test_create_payment_link_without_accepte: PASSED - Creates link with null (all configured)

endpoints_tested: GET /api/pay/company-currencies/:id - returns all currencies with configuration status

verified_fixes.fix_1_getConfiguredCurrenciesForCheckout: VERIFIED - Reads accepted_currencies from payment link and filters results correctly
verified_fixes.fix_2_getData_available_currencies: VERIFIED - Returns available_currencies in response for both restricted and unrestricted links
verified_fixes.fix_3_currency_validation: VERIFIED - Rejects currencies not in accepted_currencies list with proper error message
